creator: heizraum@freenet.de
text:
I use Korganizer with an "imap ressource" calendar.
It worked fine with 3.5.7, but the latest upgrade to 3.5.8 broke it.

The calendar and kontacts are blank (no date, nothing), and trying to add
an event raises an error :

No writable resource was found, saving will not be possible. Reconfigure KMail 
first.

There is a problem report at http://bugs.kde.org/ -> Bug 151831
